summary: Complete testing of Firmes Groups Module. Backend 23/23 tests passed. Frontend all 7 pages working: Groups List, Add Group, Edit Group, Group Detail, Group Categories, Group Reports, Group Export, Strategic Dashboard. All CRUD operations, member assignment, archive/close, and CSV export validated.

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warning - charts need container with defined dimensions
HTML hydration warning - <tr> inside <span> not valid HTML structure (same as previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: The HTML hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> persists in GroupReports.jsx table - same pattern as Members and Departments modules. Low priority but should be fixed for proper React hydration.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test data: 'Célula UI Teste' group and 'Célula de Teste UI' category
context_for_next_testing_agent: Groups module fully tested. All 7 pages functional via sidebar submenu under 'Grupos'. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/church/groups, POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/church/group-categories, POST/DELETE /api/church/groups/{id}/members, GET /api/church/groups/strategic-dashboard. Group cards show category badge with color, status badge, leader name, member count with avatar previews. Edit flow uses same AddGroup component with :groupId param.

sidebar_navigation.details: Grupos expandable menu with 6 sub-items: Ver todos, Adicionar grupo, Categorias de grupos, Relatórios, Exportar, Painel Estratégico

groups_list_page.details: Shows group cards with category badge (colored), status badge, member count, leader name, member avatar previews. Has search, status filter, category filter, department filter. Dropdown menu with Ver Detalhes, Editar, Encerrar, Excluir options

add_group_page.details: Form with: Nome*, Descrição, Categoria (select), Departamento (select), Líder Responsável (select), Data de Início (date), Status (select). Participantes section with member search by Nome/Cargo/Categoria, checkbox selection

edit_group_page.details: Reuses AddGroup component, loads existing group data, saves updates. URL: /dashboard/groups/edit/:groupId

group_detail_page.details: Shows group name, description, status badge, Export CSV button. KPI cards: Participantes count, Líder, Categoria, Departamento. Members table with remove button. URL: /dashboard/groups/:groupId

group_categories_page.details: CRUD for categories. Dialog form with Nome* and Color picker. Categories displayed in grid with edit/delete buttons. URL: /dashboard/groups/categories

group_reports_page.details: KPI cards: Grupos Ativos, Total Participantes, Encerrados, Maior Grupo. Ranking section with numbered list. Full groups table with Grupo/Categoria/Líder/Membros/Status columns. Export CSV button. URL: /dashboard/groups/reports

group_export_page.details: Select dropdown to choose 'Lista geral de grupos' or specific group's participants. Exportar CSV button triggers download. URL: /dashboard/groups/export

strategic_dashboard_page.details: KPI cards: Grupos Ativos, Total Participantes, Encerrados, Maior Grupo (shows group name). Bar charts: Grupos por Categoria, Grupos por Departamento. Top 10 Grupos ranking. URL: /dashboard/groups/strategic

archive_close_group.details: Encerrar via dropdown changes status to 'closed', shows toast 'Grupo encerrado', badge changes. Reativar changes back to 'active'

delete_group.details: Excluir via dropdown with confirmation, removes group and member links

group_members.details: Add members via form checkboxes during create/edit. Remove members via button on detail page. No duplicate links allowed (backend verified)

backend_crud_groups.details: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/church/groups with filters (status, category_id, department_id, leader_id, search)

backend_strategic_dashboard.details: GET /api/church/groups/strategic-dashboard returns total_groups, total_closed, total_participants, by_category, by_department, ranking

csv_export.details: Export buttons work on Reports page (all groups), Export page (filtered), and Detail page (group members)

coverage: List groups with filters (status, category, search)
Error handling (404 for nonexistent, 400 for empty member list, 401/403 for unauthorized)
